name: Cyclea Peltata
summary: Cyclea peltata lean monograph row enriched in bulk mode.
description: Cyclea peltata lean monograph row enriched in bulk mode.
safetyNotes: Alkaloid-rich traditional herb; human safety data are limited. Avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding and unsupervised high-dose use.
interactions: use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Protective effect of Cyclea peltata Lam on cisplatin-induced nephrotoxicity and oxidative damage
Gastric antisecretory and antiulcer activities of Cyclea peltata (Lam.) Hook. f. & Thoms. in rats
Development of EPS-rich herbal shampoo base fermented using Cyclea peltata leaf powder and Lactobacillus plantarum
